text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Keep your eyes glued on me while I run, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
1,200-meter races are over in a flash. You can't
look away for even a second.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll make aaall your worries fly away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll make aaall your worries fly away! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I have to make sure to really pay attention.
